code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_Serverless] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为CloudNative Serverless组件设计一个DM私信模块的状态机。核心流程是：组件挂载后先初始化，然后订阅DMS消息服务。订阅成功后进入加载状态，这里要分三种情况——没消息就显示Empty，有消息就展示ThreadList，订阅失败则跳Error。
明白了，Loading到Empty和ThreadList是互斥的。那Empty状态如果收到第一条消息，是直接转到ThreadList吗？还有Error之后能恢复吗？
对，Empty收到First message received就转到ThreadList。Error可以重试，Retry success回到ThreadList，但如果是Fatal error就要终止到CloudNative HelmChart。另外ThreadList上要有Pull to refresh功能，刷新中叫Refreshing状态。
好的，我先把主干状态加上：Initializing、Loading、Empty、ThreadList、Error、Refreshing，以及终止状态CloudNative_HelmChart。现在补用户交互流程——选中会话进入ThreadSelected，可以Back to list返回，也可以发消息？
发送流程要拆细一点，安全要求比较高。用户打字是Composing，点击发送后先进Encrypting，用NIP04Service做NIP04加密，加密完成到Publishing，由EventPublisherService发布kind 4事件到relays。Publish success再回到ThreadSelected。
Encrypting和Publishing这两个状态需要加注释说明具体服务吗？还有，发送失败怎么处理？

需要加注释，Encrypting旁边注明用recipient's public key加密，Publishing注明发布kind 4 event。发送失败Publishing到Error。另外补两个细节：ThreadSelected要有Auto-mark as read，进入MarkingRead然后Update complete回来；还要支持删除会话，Deleting之后Delete complete回到ThreadList。
全部加上了。检查一遍：从CloudNative Serverless启动，经过初始化、加载、分支到空态或列表，列表支持刷新、选会话、发送（含加密发布）、自动标记已读、删除，错误可重试或致命退出。两个服务注释也放在Encrypting和Publishing右侧。
